item.title: Issue #2660 created
item.description:
`fn:matching-segments`: named capture groups

Once again I’m flooding the issue list: Named capture groups would be a great extension in the interplay with fn:matching-segments. Instead of ?groups?1?group, we could write ?groups?city?group.

I’ve marked the issue with nice-to-have. Let’s see if I can create a PR for it after Prague.
